---
title: "About Aaron Robbins"
---

<!-- TODO (Cowork): Full bio + resume section. Outline below is a placeholder. -->

::: {.todo-block}
**TODO (Cowork — About page):** Draft the full "About Aaron" content including: (1) professional bio paragraph, (2) career highlights / key roles, (3) skills & tools section, (4) resume download link, (5) contact info (email, LinkedIn, GitHub). Suggested structure follows below.
:::

## Bio

<!-- TODO (Cowork): 3–4 sentence professional bio. -->

*Placeholder — Cowork to draft.*

---

## Skills & Tools

| Category | Tools |
|---|---|
| Data Platforms | SQL Server, Microsoft Fabric, Azure Synapse |
| Visualization | Power BI, DAX |
| Languages | SQL, Python, T-SQL |
| Pipeline | PySpark, Notebook orchestration |
| Source Control | Git, GitHub |

---

## Experience Highlights

<!-- TODO (Cowork): 3–4 bullet-point career highlights, emphasizing analytics leadership, healthcare/e-commerce domains, and scale of work. -->

::: {.todo-block}
**TODO (Cowork — Experience):** 3–4 bullets: roles, industries, scale (rows processed, reports deployed, teams led, etc.). Frame for a CVS interview audience — healthcare data familiarity is a plus.
:::

---

## Contact

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
**GitHub**
[github.com/RobbinsAnalytics](https://github.com/RobbinsAnalytics)
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
**LinkedIn**
<!-- TODO (Cowork): Add LinkedIn URL -->
[linkedin.com/in/aaronrobbins](#)
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
**Resume**
<!-- TODO (Cowork): Upload PDF to assets/ and link here -->
[Download PDF](#){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
:::
:::
